description: These clogs from crocs are the perfect blend of comfort and style. Jump around in them at the park, lounge in them at home, or take a walk on the beach in these youthful clogs... perfect for all situations, they'll look fab with all your casual clothes. UpperFully moulded Croslite upper with a closed toe design for style, durability and comfortHoles on the forefoot for increased ventilation and fabulous shoe charmsHeel-hugging back strap for fashionable comfortBrand badge on forefootBrand name embossed on strap and heelBrand tab on sides of both strapsCroslite foot-bed with circulation nubs for a massage-like feelBrand logo embossed on foot-bedOut-soleNon-marking, slip-resistant Croslite out-soleMulti-directional textured leaf-shaped grooves in the forefoot and back-foot for ample grip, stability and comfortSandal careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust
